key_drivers: Real yields falling sharply (DFII10 at 1.88%) providing strong tailwind for gold and growth equities
Risk-off surge: VIX spiked to 26.78 (+11.31%) and MOVE index surged 28.24% amid US military strikes and Iran tensions
RBA hawkish hike to 4.1% offset by China PMI contraction (49.0) and global risk-off, pressuring AUD

fallbacks_used: Copper price from TradingEconomics (investing.com blocked by policy)
Gold ETF flows from World Gold Council via Seeking Alpha/ETF.com
Geopolitical risk assessed from CBOE VIX market insights and Reuters news
